claim.statement: An empirical (not-yet-proved) impossibility from ongoing unpublished research: a numerically robust floor that no tested perturbation has breached. Specifics are withheld until publication; registered here only to exercise the R4 rung and the deferred/manual status.
claim.negation_of: a configuration that breaches the (withheld) numerical floor

rung.name: empirical-robust
trusted_base: a numerical stress-test battery (finite perturbation set)
NOT a proof -- an empirical barrier; full details withheld pending publication

checker.promote_recipe: On publication, promote by either (R2) formalizing the proved bound as a lean-axioms entry, or (R4-automated) wiring a numeric-report checker that re-runs the stored perturbation battery and re-asserts the floor under every perturbation, failing closed on any breach.

provenance.source_package: private research (unpublished; specifics intentionally redacted for public release)
provenance.pipeline: stress-test battery over a private analysis result

one_directional: Registered honestly at R4: this entry can never report CERTIFIED in v0 (checker is manual/deferred); promotion requires either a real proof or an automated re-assertion of the stored numeric floor.
